journal_entry.description: Construction of land improvements and permanent landscaping
journal_entry.rationale: Fencing, streetlights, and walkways are depreciable land improvements (finite useful life). Permanent landscaping installations are non-depreciable land improvements (indefinite life). Both are capitalized as separate PP&E assets due to different subsequent treatment. Cash and bank accounts decrease.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Two distinct asset increases: depreciable land improvements (fencing, streetlights, walkways with finite useful lives) and non-depreciable land improvements (permanent landscaping with indefinite life). Two asset decreases: cash and bank. Separate accounts required because depreciation treatment differs.
